$description: Spotify — Spotify Green accent on near-black canvas, pill-and-circle geometry, heavy shadows, content-first immersion. Derived from the public Spotify product surface (getdesign.md/spotify). Not an official Spotify design system. MIT.

accent.$description: Spotify Green — the canonical brand accent. Reserved for play controls, active states, primary CTAs. Never decorative.

accent-hover.$description: Spotify legacy green — used for pressed / active states.

highlight.$description: Announcement blue — info states (per Spotify DESIGN.md).

black.$description: Body ink — on Spotify's dark canvas the default text reads pure-white. Semantic-name kept, value flipped to invert the palette without rewriting layouts.

ink.$description: Pure black — chapter dividers, deepest contrast band beneath the canvas.

graphite.$description: Body strong on dark — near-pure white for max emphasis.

steel.$description: Silver — secondary text, muted labels, inactive nav (Spotify DESIGN.md).

silver.$description: Light border — outlined-pill border, muted links.

fog.$description: Border gray — button borders on dark surfaces.

paper.$description: Surface (Level 1) — dark card, sidebar, container surface.

off-white.$description: On-dark text — pure white. Also reads on Spotify Green pills.

off-white-2.$description: On-dark soft — secondary labels, footer body.

surface-dark.$description: Base (Level 0) — Spotify's near-black canvas, the brand-defining backdrop.

surface-dark-elevated.$description: Mid Dark — pill button background, interactive surfaces.

surface-dark-soft.$description: Soft dark band — Surface Level 1 alias.

surface-cream-strong.$description: Mid Card — alternate elevated card surface.

accent-teal.$description: Announcement blue — playlist blue, info indicators.

white.$description: Canvas — Spotify's true-black surface. Semantic-name kept, value flipped to invert the palette without rewriting layouts.

status-current.$description: Status: in progress — alias of severity-medium.

status-next.$description: Status: not yet started — muted neutral.

font-family.$description: Spotify house pairing — SpotifyMixUI / SpotifyMixUITitle (CircularSp, custom Circular by Lineto, not freely licensed). System sans fallback chain.

font-weight.$description: Spotify uses a bold/regular binary — 700 for emphasis, 400 for body, 600 used sparingly. The 700/400 contrast IS the typographic hierarchy.

bold.$description: Display, button labels, active nav, emphasis. The workhorse.

font-size.$description: Sizes scaled to the 1920x1080 deck baseline; Spotify's web spec is 10–24px (compact app density), here scaled up roughly 4x for deck context while preserving the 700/400 weight binary.

slide-title.$description: Hero h1 — bold lowercase or sentence case, weight 700.

sub.$description: Sub-headline. Weight 400 — the editorial counterpoint to 700.

eyebrow.$description: Small bold UPPERCASE — weight 700, 1.4px tracking. Section eyebrow voice.

radius.$description: Spotify pill-and-circle geometry. `btn` and `chip` go to 9999 (full pill). `card` is 8px (album-art register). `pill` is the icon-button slot.

btn.$description: Pill button — Spotify's iconic CTA shape.

chip.$description: Pill chip — UPPERCASE label inside a fully rounded pill.

card.$description: Card / surface corner — Spotify's album-art card register (DESIGN.md cards 6–8px).

layout.$description: Spotify is dense — playlist grids and track lists pack tightly. Section spacing is tighter than BMW's 80px.

cover.$description: Spotify cover treatment — album-art-tile background with gradient fade to surface-dark, lowercase huge title, Spotify Green pill CTA at lower-left.

tile-grid.$description: 5-column album shelf at top fading into the dark canvas.

section-marker.$description: Equalizer-bar marker — three vertical pill bars of varying height, Spotify Green. Reads as the iconic sound-wave divider. Replaces BMW's M-stripe role.

photography.$description: Spotify photography — square album-art, 8px rounded, no shadow on individual tiles (the shelf grid carries the elevation), duotone treatment optional.

headline-rule.$description: Spotify headlines — sentence case (or lowercase for hero), weight 700, no negative tracking, generous line-height. Display reads bold and confident.

chip-rule.$description: Spotify pill button / chip label — UPPERCASE 14px / 700 / 1.4px (~0.1em) tracking. Iconic systematic 'label' voice.

shadow.$description: Spotify depth scale (DESIGN.md §6). Cards use `elevated`; modals/menus use `dialog`. Heavy shadows are non-negotiable on the dark canvas — light shadows are invisible.
